use_cases: Hero section backdrop for creative portfolios and landing pages
Animated background visual for music and entertainment platforms
Ambient effect for gaming and immersive experience websites
Loading or splash screen visual for modern web applications
Decorative background for event and festival marketing sites
ai_summary: A Three.js WebGL shader component that renders a mesmerizing aurora borealis effect using GLSL fragment shaders with FBM (Fractal Brownian Motion) noise. The shader creates flowing, organic curtains of light in natural aurora colors (greens, teals, purples) with subtle mouse-reactive parallax. Installed from 21st.dev for creating ambient visual effects on websites.
